title: Wandering Cursebringer
description: Adds the Wandering Cursebringer, an illager that sells curses that make the game more difficult in return for a buff.
body: ![Wandering Cursebringer text in the minecraft logo style](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/UltrusBot/Wandering-Cursebringer/refs/heads/1.21/images/wanderingcursebringerlogo.png) **NOTE**: This mod is still in alpha, so balancing & textures are likely to change. The Wandering Cursebringer is a new mob, occasionally spawning in your Minecraft world, selling you mystical curses you can apply to yourself, twisting your experience by adding some new challenge, in return for a buff.  Currently, there are only 4 curses you can use on yourself, but more are planned. The curses currently implemented are: - **Curse of Gluttony**: Your hunger bar depletes faster, but you can eat faster too. - **Curse of the Glass Heart**: Inspired by UHC, you can no longer naturally regenerate health, meaning you must use other methods to regain lost hearts, such as potions or golden apples. In return, you gain 5 extra max health. - **Curse of Insomnia**: You can no longer sleep in beds, but during the night you gain speed & damage. - **Curse of Nyctophobia**: Staying in the dark too long will begin to damage you, and cover your screen with a dark creeping overlay, the damage you deal goes up immensely as you stay in the dark too. Currently planned features: - Cursed Spells, illager inspired spells sold by the Wandering Cursebringer. - Cursed Alter, a alter you can remove your curses at for the price of XP. - Many more curses
